testcase.name: traceIdFromXRequestIdAppearsInLogLine
testcase.system-out: 13:57:54.084 [testcontainers-lifecycle-0] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 - Creating container for image: testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 13:57:54.244 [testcontainers-lifecycle-0] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 - Container testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 is starting: e639ece5c9c15bfe31414d6614450cd60638cae41fabb4a9b34989e6228626aa 13:57:55.035 [testcontainers-lifecycle-0] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 - Container testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 started in PT0.951611274S 13:57:55.043 [testcontainers-lifecycle-0] INFO tc.grafana/loki:3.0.0 - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T13:57:57.517011551Z caller=main.go:120 msg="Starting Loki" version="(version=3.0.0, branch=HEAD, revision=b4f7181c7a)" 13:57:57.589 [docker-java-stream-645753339] INFO tc.loki - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T13:57:57.559414924Z caller=server.go:354 msg="server listening on addresses" http=[::]:3100 grpc=[::]:9095 13:57:57.589 [docker-java-stream-645753339] INFO tc.loki - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T13:57:57.563550323Z caller=table_manager.go:136 index-store=tsdb-2020-10-24 msg="uploading tables" 13:57:57.589 [docker-java-stream-645753339] INFO tc.loki - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T13:57:57.563732556Z caller=shipper.go:160 index-store=tsdb-2020-10-24 msg="starting index shipper in RW mode" 13:57:57.589 [docker-java-stream-645753339] INFO tc.loki - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T13:57:57.916402495Z caller=basic_lifecycler_delegates.go:63 msg="not loading tokens from file, tokens file path is empty" 13:57:57.990 [docker-java-stream-645753339] INFO tc.loki - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T13:57:57.917396289Z caller=lifecycler.go:483 component=ingester msg="auto-joining cluster after timeout" ring=ingester 13:57:57.992 [docker-java-stream-645753339] INFO tc.loki - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T13:58:01.073027746Z caller=scheduler.go:653 msg="this scheduler is in the ReplicationSet, will now accept requests." 13:58:01.089 [docker-java-stream-645753339] INFO tc.loki - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T13:58:01.073069541Z caller=worker.go:210 component=querier msg="adding connection" addr=127.0.0.1:9095 13:58:03.088 [docker-java-stream-645753339] INFO tc.loki - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T13:58:03.081586829Z caller=compactor.go:489 msg="this instance has been chosen to run the compactor, starting compactor" 13:58:03.088 [docker-java-stream-645753339] INFO tc.loki - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T13:58:03.08165005Z caller=compactor.go:518 msg="waiting 10m0s for ring to stay stable and previous compactions to finish before starting compactor" 13:58:08.087 [docker-java-stream-645753339] INFO tc.loki - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T13:58:08.073254445Z caller=frontend_scheduler_worker.go:106 msg="adding connection to scheduler" addr=127.0.0.1:9095 13:58:14.146 [testcontainers-lifecycle-0] INFO tc.grafana/loki:3.0.0 - Container grafana/loki:3.0.0 started in PT19.102963727S 13:58:14.148 [testcontainers-lifecycle-1] INFO t.o.104.0 - Creating container for image: otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib:0.104.0 13:58:14.251 [testcontainers-lifecycle-1] INFO t.o.104.0 - Container otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib:0.104.0 is starting: 591b55c268ff7747d935c335b986c3857929e35002aac86dc3d85000d37a792a 13:58:15.250 [docker-java-stream--71281006] INFO tc.collector - STDERR: 2026-05-11T13:58:15.248Z info service@v0.104.0/service.go:115 Setting up own telemetry... 13:58:15.250 [docker-java-stream--71281006] INFO tc.collector - STDERR: 2026-05-11T13:58:15.249Z info service@v0.104.0/telemetry.go:96 Serving metrics {"address": ":8888", "level": "Normal"} 13:58:15.250 [docker-java-stream--71281006] INFO tc.collector - STDERR: 2026-05-11T13:58:15.249Z info lokiexporter@v0.104.0/exporter.go:43 using the new Loki exporter {"kind": "exporter", "data_type": "logs", "name": "loki"} 13:58:15.251 [docker-java-stream--71281006] INFO tc.collector - STDERR: 2026-05-11T13:58:15.251Z info service@v0.104.0/service.go:193 Starting otelcol-contrib... {"Version": "0.104.0", "NumCPU": 14} 13:58:15.252 [docker-java-stream--71281006] INFO tc.collector - STDERR: 2026-05-11T13:58:15.251Z info extensions/extensions.go:34 Starting extensions... 13:58:15.252 [docker-java-stream--71281006] INFO tc.collector - STDERR: 2026-05-11T13:58:15.251Z info otlpreceiver@v0.104.0/otlp.go:102 Starting GRPC server {"kind": "receiver", "name": "otlp", "data_type": "logs", "endpoint": "0.0.0.0:4317"} 13:58:15.283 [docker-java-stream--71281006] INFO tc.collector - STDERR: 2026-05-11T13:58:15.282Z info service@v0.104.0/service.go:219 Everything is ready. Begin running and processing data. 13:58:15.283 [testcontainers-lifecycle-1] INFO t.o.104.0 - Container otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib:0.104.0 started in PT1.135746407S 13:58:15.502 [main] INFO i.g.r.otellogs.OtelLogsReporter - OTel logs reporter started — exporting to http://localhost:4317

testcase.name: traceparentHeaderSetsTraceContext
testcase.system-out: 13:58:17.788 [docker-java-stream-645753339] INFO tc.loki - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T13:58:17.721359385Z caller=roundtrip.go:289 org_id=fake traceID=0420583df6c0a31f msg="executing query" type=range query="{job=\"gravitee/gravitee-otel-logs\"} |= \"550e8400\"" start=2026-05-11T13:56:17.689Z end=2026-05-11T13:58:22.689Z start_delta=2m0.032355905s end_delta=-4.967644003s length=2m5s step=1000 query_hash=455623281 13:58:17.788 [docker-java-stream-645753339] INFO tc.loki - testcase.name: endpointStatusDownAppearsInLoki
